# Davant Systems

> AI-powered creative tools for designers, artists, and visual arts professionals. Based in Los Angeles, Davant Systems builds software that makes AI image generation accessible and practical for creative workflows.

Davant Systems develops products across two categories: desktop creative software and interactive event experiences. All products emphasize local/on-device AI processing, privacy, and ease of use.

## Products

- [Davant Studio](https://www.davantsystems.com/davant-studio): AI image generation desktop app for creative professionals. Run Stable Diffusion locally with an intuitive interface, Photoshop integration, and ControlNet support.
- [Davant Studio Download](https://www.davantsystems.com/davant-studio/download): Download page for Davant Studio, including system requirements and pricing.
- [Magic Mirror AI Photo Booth](https://www.davantsystems.com/photobooth): Interactive AI photo booth experience available to rent for events. Real-time style transfer and instant prints.
- [Offline Background Remover](https://www.davantsystems.com/offline-background-remover): macOS app for instant background removal using on-device AI. No uploads, no subscription, pay once.

## Company

- [About](https://www.davantsystems.com/about): About Davant Systems and our mission.
- [Ambassador Program](https://www.davantsystems.com/ambassadors): Community program for visual artists and creatives exploring AI in their practice.
- [Press & Media](https://www.davantsystems.com/press): Press kit, logos, screenshots, and brand assets.

## Optional

- [Event Photo Galleries](https://www.davantsystems.com/event-galleries): Photo galleries from events powered by Magic Mirror.
- [Training & Workshops](https://www.davantsystems.com/training): Workshops on AI creative tools.
- [Compatibility Checker](https://www.davantsystems.com/compatibility-checker): Hardware compatibility checker for Davant Studio.
- [Resources](https://www.davantsystems.com/resources): Resource links for Davant Studio users.
- [Articles](https://www.davantsystems.com/articles): Blog posts and articles.
- [Offline Background Remover Support](https://www.davantsystems.com/offline-background-remover/support): Support and FAQ for the Offline Background Remover app.
- [Offline Background Remover Privacy Policy](https://www.davantsystems.com/offline-background-remover/privacy-policy): Privacy policy for the Offline Background Remover app.
